name: Unlock The King 3
short_description: A new sequel of the successful Unlock The King, now with 3D boards based on Rubik's Cubes. An originally designed puzzle game inspired by chess. Move the pieces and create a path to Unlock the King.
detailed_description:
A new sequel of the successful Unlock The King, now with 3D boards based on Rubik's Cubes. An originally designed puzzle game inspired by chess. Move the pieces and create a path to Unlock the King.

  • Brand new gameplay mechanics based on the Rubik's cube;

  • Originally designed concept, including electronic board, lightning-fast piece movements, trigger buttons, and movable parts;

  • 50 original design levels;

  • Original soundtrack;

  • Designed for Unlock The King fans and newcomers alike.
